name: Bright Pattern

hero.heading: Gapflow and Bright Pattern
hero.subheading: Automate omnichannel contact center operations and customer interactions

documentation.title: Getting Started with Bright Pattern
documentation.description: Connect Bright Pattern to Gapflow and learn how to automate call routing, messaging, and omnichannel workflows.

documentation.title: Omnichannel Automation
documentation.description: Build unified workflows that handle voice, chat, email, and SMS interactions from a single automated system.

documentation.title: Agent & Queue Management
documentation.description: Automate agent assignment, queue prioritization, and workload distribution for optimal contact center performance.

tutorials.title: Intelligent Call Routing System
tutorials.description: Build a smart routing system that analyzes caller data, identifies priority, and routes to the best available agent automatically.

tutorials.title: Omnichannel Customer Journey
tutorials.description: Create seamless customer experiences across voice, chat, email, and SMS with unified interaction history and routing.

tutorials.title: Automated Outbound Campaigns
tutorials.description: Set up proactive outreach campaigns with predictive dialing, automated callbacks, and comprehensive results tracking.

faqs.question: How do I connect Bright Pattern?
faqs.answer: Use API credentials from your Bright Pattern tenant. You'll need access to the REST API and webhook configurations.

faqs.question: What channels are supported?
faqs.answer: Voice calls, SMS, email, web chat, mobile app messaging, and social media channels. Full omnichannel capabilities.

faqs.question: Can I customize routing logic?
faqs.answer: Yes! Build complex routing rules based on caller data, agent skills, queue priority, time of day, and custom criteria.

faqs.question: How does CRM integration work?
faqs.answer: Integrate with Salesforce, Dynamics, HubSpot and more. Screen pops, automatic logging, and bi-directional data sync.

faqs.question: What about call recording?
faqs.answer: Access call recordings via API, trigger transcription services, and implement automated quality assurance workflows.

faqs.question: Can I analyze interactions?
faqs.answer: Yes! Extract interaction data, perform sentiment analysis, identify trends, and generate comprehensive performance reports.

testimonials.quote: Call routing intelligence reduced wait times 45%. Customers reach the right agent immediately every time.
testimonials.author: Patricia Davis

testimonials.quote: Omnichannel automation unified our entire operation. Seamless handoffs between channels, perfect history.
testimonials.author: Carlos Rodriguez

testimonials.quote: Automated follow-ups increased conversion 30%. No customer interaction falls through the cracks anymore.
testimonials.author: Rachel Kim

testimonials.quote: CRM integration is flawless. Agents have complete context instantly, customer satisfaction is at all-time high.
testimonials.author: Michael Brown

limits.title: API Rate Limits
limits.description: Bright Pattern APIs have rate limits based on your deployment. Implement appropriate throttling for high-volume scenarios.

limits.title: Concurrent Interactions
limits.description: Limits depend on your license. Plan agent capacity and queue management to handle peak volumes efficiently.

limits.title: Recording Storage
limits.description: Call recordings consume storage. Implement lifecycle policies to archive or delete old recordings per compliance requirements.

limits.title: Channel Availability
limits.description: Some channels require additional licensing. Verify channel availability with your Bright Pattern subscription.
